concerns.text: FR-012 requires filtering dataset to hyperbolic volume >0 (exclude torus/satellite knots), but no task explicitly implements this filtering. T042 only documents excluded knots. Add task to implement dataset filtering with volume >0 condition.

SC-008 requires coverage documentation for core invariants in invariant_coverage.md (plan.md lists this file), but no task creates it. Add task to generate invariant_coverage.md with counts of available vs unavailable records per invariant.

FR-013 requires source independence assessment between Knot Atlas and KnotInfo documented in hyperbolic_volume_validation.md. T044 validates volume but doesn't explicitly require source independence documentation. Update T044 to include source independence assessment.

FR-010/SC-006 require explicit handling for ambiguous alternating classification (exclude or mark unclassifiable). T014/T036 handle general flags but no task explicitly implements FR-010 scenario. Add task for ambiguous classification handling.

FR-007 and Constitution Principle III require checksums recorded under data/ directory with documentation in docs/reproducibility/. T040 only mentions docs/reproducibility/checksums.md. Update T040 to specify checksums recorded under data/ AND documented in docs/reproducibility/.

T032/T033 reference 'combined complexity metric visualization' and 'interpretation' per Dan Rockmore review, but FR-005 explicitly states 'Core Methodology: Analysis focuses on crossing number and braid index as separate predictors, not composite measures.' These tasks reference a combined metric that doesn't exist in spec. Remove or rename to reflect separate predictors.

T022 references validating 'crossing number and braid index' against KnotInfo per FR-003, but FR-003 and SC-008 explicitly state core invariants are TABULATED from Knot Atlas (not computed), so algorithm validation applies only to Phase 2+ additional invariants. Update T022 to reference Phase 2+ additional invariants only.

T018 implements 'precision validation module' for crossing number and braid index, but FR-003/SC-008 clarify core invariants are tabulated (not computed), so precision validation applies only to Phase 2+ additional invariants. Update T018 to reference Phase 2+ scope.
